name: Brownie Cheesecake Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, melted butter, cocoa, 2 eggs, milk, and 2 teaspoons vanilla extract. Mix until well blended.
4. Stir in the chopped nuts (if using) and pour into the prepared baking pan.
5. In a small mixing bowl, beat together the cream cheese, 2 tablespoons butter, and cornstarch until smooth.
6. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk and the remaining egg and teaspoon vanilla extract to the cream cheese mixture. Beat until smooth.
7. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the brownie batter.
8. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until the top is lightly browned.
9. Allow to cool completely, then refrigerate.
10. Cut into bars and store covered in the refrigerator.
